flags.message: segment_base_rate and brier_skill_score are omitted on all three evaluations this cell: the committed statpack's per-Term salience segments are empty for every Term (metrics/statpack.json terms[].segments == []), and statpack.md carries no 'Segment base rate by salience band' table, so no prior-Term band rate exists to pool for this Term-2025 case. Not a predictor fault; the skill metric will stay null until the statpack emits populated segments.
